rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings after subcomponents and connections.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds in type scope contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex content respects AADL scope rules and component type vs implementation distinctions.
Validate that expression types match declared helper types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const declarations for thresholds and visible feature names in AGREE contracts.
Construct range checks as boolean expressions using >= and <= with visible variables.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
